top_articles.title: PoC Code Published for Critical NGINX Vulnerability
top_articles.summary: Introduced in 2008, the critical-severity security defect was patched this week in NGINX Plus and NGINX open source.

top_articles.title: Microsoft Warns of Exchange Server Zero-Day Exploited in the Wild
top_articles.summary: Microsoft has shared mitigations for CVE-2026-42897 until a permanent patch can be released for affected Exchange Server versions.

top_articles.title: Funnel Builder WordPress plugin bug exploited to steal credit cards
top_articles.summary: A critical vulnerability in the Funnel Builder plugin for WordPress is being actively exploited to inject malicious JavaScript snippets into WooCommerce checkout pages.

top_articles.title: Chrome 148 Update Patches Critical Vulnerabilities
top_articles.summary: The refresh resolves critical-severity use-after-free and other types of bugs in various browser components.

top_articles.title: Cisco Patches Another SD-WAN Zero-Day, the Sixth Exploited in 2026
top_articles.summary: The zero-day, tracked as CVE-2026-20182, has been exploited in targeted attacks by a sophisticated threat actor identified as UAT-8616.
